---
title: "Exercise 8: Big data"
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
TBD: traditional case study (with questions)?
:::

::: callout-note
TODO
:::

## Exam prep

TODO : include specific questions/tasks that could be included in the exam.

::: {.callout-tip title="Session 8 survey"}
Before you wrap up, please complete the Session 8 survey here: [{{< var sessions.session_8.survey_url >}}]({{< var sessions.session_8.survey_url >}}){target="_blank"}. Thank you 🙏
:::
